fund_name: Motilal Oswal Midcap Fund Direct Growth
exit_load_description: 1% if redeemed or switched out within 15 days of allotment; nil thereafter
fund_objective: Generate long-term capital appreciation by investing primarily in mid-cap stocks with strong earnings growth potential. The fund targets 25-30 high-conviction mid-cap companies using a bottom-up stock selection approach.

fund_name: Motilal Oswal Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth
exit_load_description: 1% if redeemed or switched out within 15 days of allotment; nil thereafter
fund_objective: Generate long-term capital appreciation through diversified equity investments across large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap stocks, with flexibility to shift allocations based on prevailing valuations and opportunities.

fund_name: Motilal Oswal Nifty Midcap 150 Index Fund Direct Growth
sub_category: Open Ended Scheme Replicating Nifty Midcap 150 Index
exit_load_description: 0.1% if redeemed within 15 days of allotment; nil thereafter
fund_objective: Passively replicate the Nifty Midcap 150 Index by investing in its constituent stocks in the same proportion, providing low-cost exposure to the top 150 mid-cap companies on NSE by free-float market capitalisation.

fund_name: HDFC Large and Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
exit_load_description: 1% if redeemed within 1 year of allotment; nil thereafter
fund_objective: Generate long-term capital appreciation by investing at least 35% each in large-cap and mid-cap stocks, combining the stability of large-cap companies with the growth potential of mid-cap companies.

fund_name: HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth
exit_load_description: 1% if redeemed within 1 year of allotment; nil thereafter
fund_objective: Generate long-term capital appreciation by investing across large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap stocks based on market outlook and bottom-up stock selection, with a portfolio of 50-60 quality businesses at reasonable valuations.

fund_name: HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth
exit_load_description: 1% if redeemed within 1 year of allotment; nil thereafter
fund_objective: Generate long-term capital appreciation by investing at least 80% of assets in large-cap stocks (top 100 companies by market capitalisation), with a portfolio of 40-50 large-cap stocks selected for quality, earnings visibility, and reasonable valuations.
